name: User Design
mobile_desc: Approach to design incorporating user in mind through all stages of design
desktop_desc: Experienced in all facets of UX | UI Design including wireframing, creating mockups, and prototyping. I've worked with others on researching, creating, and developing preliminary designs for websites & web applications
desktop_exp: Experienced in using Figma, Canva, and Powerpoint to create and demonstrate UX | UI designs for websites and web applications.

name: Front-End Development
mobile_desc: User Interface and Layout Development through primarily Javascript frameworks & libraries
desktop_subtitle: Responsive Design with latest JS Frameworks & libraries
desktop_desc: Experienced working with CSS & HTML. Focused on creating responsive designs fit for a variety of resolutions and technologies. Knowlegable with a variety of different Javascript frameworks to create a single page applications or websites.
desktop_exp: Experienced in base CSS, Javascript libraries and frameworks such as React, Angular, and Vue as well as many javascript libraries such as react-router.

name: Back-End Development
mobile_desc: Database, System design, and flexible with many other languages and projects
desktop_subtitle: Database, API, and a variety of other applications
desktop_desc: Performed Data Analysis & Data processing using Python and used C & C++ for System Programming. I've also worked extensively in Java using OOP creating basic applications.
desktop_exp: Currently focused on Python & Java. Can work in many other languages if needed
